creator: db@FreeBSD.org
text:
ok I think this is the correct tarball for all of cura. Please let me know if this looks good. fetch www.FreeBSD.org/~db/cura_5.tar.bz2
be sure to clean out the old versions as I note that a lot of files are now deleted. Here's a git diff against head as well. fetch www.FreeBSD.org/~db/cura_5_git.diff 
I cannot get rust to compile on FreeBSD-HEAD hence I am only testing against 14.1
